gold.title: File Upload
gold.reason: The highest-performing component in this folder (1333 downloads, 27 likes) — framer-motion stacked card animation on drag, react-dropzone integration, file list display, and a distinctive visual identity. A Gold showpiece for any SaaS onboarding or media upload flow.

silver.title: Animated Download
silver.reason: 68 downloads — animated download button with scrambling alphabet text, framer-motion progress states, and reduced-motion support. Polished micro-interaction that elevates download CTAs on marketing/SaaS sites, though it is a button rather than a full upload component.
